anomalies.t: NEW CRITICAL: Smoke Claude failed when `Install Playwright CLI skills` step timed out 10min. Root cause = firewall blocks Playwright FFmpeg CDN: `playwright-akamai.azureedge.net`, `playwright-verizon.azureedge.net`, `playwright.azureedge.net` not in allowed_domains. The allowlist contains `cdn.playwright.dev` but the actual binary download lives behind Azure CDN. Two-line fix in workflow frontmatter (add the 3 hosts) OR cache FFmpeg in runner image.

STUCK: Changeset Generator still on gpt-5.3-codex → 404. EXACT same recommendation given yesterday and 2 days ago is unactioned. Other codex workflows migrated to gpt-5.4 and succeed. One workflow frontmatter edit is blocking this from full resolution for 7 days.

PERSISTENT but DOWN: 2 occurrences today (Contribution Check), vs 15 yesterday. Partial mitigation appears to have landed but pattern not eliminated. Fix at MCP-validation layer (reject target=* without item_number) would close the gap permanently.

NEW SPIKE: 24.9% block rate (was 16.4% yest, 17.9% before). Driven by 2 specific issues: (1) Playwright FFmpeg CDN blocks in Smoke Claude (root cause of Smoke Claude fail); (2) Smoke Pi `api-proxy:10002`/`api-proxy:10000` internal proxy blocks (91% block rate). Tail of `(unknown)` DNS-failure blocks still ~300/day.

NEW observability hotspot: Smoke Pi blocked 20/22 requests (91%) on internal `api-proxy:10000`/`10002` endpoints. Workflow itself succeeded (test passes despite blocks) but the high block rate suggests either the smoke is intentionally testing block behavior OR config drift on the api-proxy hostnames. Worth a quick review.

IMPROVING: variance now 10-48 turns (avg 34.7) — significantly tighter than yesterday's 0-217 range. 3/3 runs today succeeded. Observability still flags as MEDIUM drift but trajectory is healthy. Consider de-escalation tomorrow.
RESOLVED: 0 occurrences across 9 claude runs today. Yesterday's wrapper-drain hypothesis either fixed itself or recommendation landed. Close.
QUIET: 0 occurrences in 22 copilot runs today. Pattern is intermittent — keep low-priority watch.
RESOLVED: Smoke Copilot succeeded today including upload_artifact test. Yesterday's prompt-fix recommendation likely landed or was transient.
PENDING: workflow still in_progress at audit time (3.6m / unknown completion). Cannot confirm whether the $9.90 spike continues. Re-audit tomorrow with the completed run.
90.9% success rate today on 33 completed runs (mid-day, partial). 8-day trend: 92.78 → 88.89 → 85.9 → 75.6 → 41.6 → 81.1 → 94.7 → 85.7 → 90.9. Recovering from May 23 cliff; back to typical range.
DAY 4 CONFIRMED: 22 copilot runs today, 0 ENOENT, 0 anthropic-beta errors. Mark as long-stable. Pin 1.0.52 as min when convenient.

Top effective_tokens today: PR Code Quality Reviewer 16.5M, Daily Project Performance 12.3M, Matt Pocock Skills 11.3M, Smoke Codex 11.2M, Test Quality Sentinel 10.8M. Top action_minutes: AI Moderator 17m, PR Sous Chef 14m, Smoke Claude 14m (timeout). Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer still pending.
